categories.name: Sites of the current CJP led student protests

fun_fact: Over the last few days, protests have erupted across India, demanding accountability for the gross mismanagement of exams in the country's education system. And they are being violently squashed by the police. Why are we talking about it in a climate puzzle? Because there is no Ecological justice without Social justice — and what's happening right now, violating the citizen's right to protest, is a gross violation of Social justice. Read more
